    Field
    Description
    (package private) final CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext
    CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorWorkerThread.context
    The CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext unique to this worker thread.

    Field
    Description
    private static final Queue<CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext>
    CombinationGeneratorTask.allContexts
    A thread-safe collection of all active CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext instances.
    Methods in com.github.mrgarbagegamer with parameters of type CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    CombinationGeneratorTask.computeIntermediateSubtasks(CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext ctx)
    Dispatches to the appropriate intermediate subtask computation method based on the CombinationGeneratorTask.skipConstraintsCheck flag.
    private void
    CombinationGeneratorTask.computeIntermediateSubtasksConstraintPath(CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext ctx)
    Forks subtasks for an intermediate task, performing a constraint check to prune invalid branches.
    private void
    CombinationGeneratorTask.computeIntermediateSubtasksSkipPath(CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext ctx)
    Forks subtasks for an intermediate task, skipping the constraint check.
    private final void
    CombinationGeneratorTask.computeLeafCombinations(CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext ctx)
    Defines a work range for a leaf task and adds it to a WorkBatch.
    private void
    CombinationGeneratorTask.computeRootSubtasks(CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext ctx)
    Computes and forks the first level of subtasks from the root task.
    private void
    CombinationGeneratorTask.recycleOwnResources(CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext ctx)
    Recycles the CombinationGeneratorTask.prefix and the CombinationGeneratorTask instance back to their respective pools within the provided CombinationGeneratorTask.GeneratorContext.

Performance-optimized brute-force solver for hexagonal grid Lights Out puzzles
